blended.narrative: Winter Park is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,897 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 31".
